Discovery: PDUFA date July 7, 2026 for atacicept in IgA Nephropathy — FDA Priority Review + Breakthrough Therapy designation; Phase 3 ORIGIN 3 showed 46% reduction in proteinuria and 42% vs placebo (p<0.0001); would be first B-cell modulator targeting both BAFF and APRIL for IgAN.
value_picks.analyst_take: PDUFA July 7 confirmed via SEC 8-K; Priority Review + BTD for IgAN; $82 median analyst target = 141% upside on approval; size at half normal risk budget for binary event

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Down 45% from high; Fwd P/E 7.8; $673M FCF positive; 12.1% revenue growth; 10.8% SI; Q2 2026 earnings as catalyst; but D/E 201.6 and structural ad platform limitations vs Meta/Google (Tier 5 — fundamentals context only)

Discovery: Down ~29% YTD 2026 (likely ~35%+ from 52-week high set in summer 2025) with 2026 earnings expected to grow 52.3% YoY and revenue up 13.4% — a classic setup where price has disconnected from improving earnings trajectory; ad spending recovery across digital platforms lifts all boats, and Snap's subscriber base is growing; Q2 2026 earnings (~August) is the near-term catalyst where a beat could trigger short covering given elevated short interest; at these levels the stock prices in near-zero terminal value for a 2.6B daily active user platform. Bear case: structurally smaller ad platform vs Meta/Google, heavy reliance on Gen-Z demographics, history of burning cash, limited pricing power in an AI-targeted advertising world.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Down 45% from high with $673M FCF positive and 10.8% SI providing short-cover potential, but D/E 201.6 and structural ad platform limitations limit conviction
